text.content:
Character Backgrounds

The backgrounds in the Player's Handbook work fine for this adventure. The table below describes how each background fits into Icewind Dale and provides a character hook.

BackgroundCharacter Hook
AcolyteAuril the Frostmaiden has blessed me, or so I believe. I came to Icewind Dale to be closer to her.
CharlatanI'm running cons in Ten-Towns, selling fake remedies for frostbite.
CriminalI fled to Icewind Dale to escape the law. No one follows you this far north.
EntertainerI came north to perform for the isolated folk of Ten-Towns, starved for entertainment.
Folk HeroI saved my hometown from a terrible monster. Now I seek new challenges.
Guild ArtisanI came to Ten-Towns to sell my wares. Markets are sparse but prices are high.
HermitI retreated to Icewind Dale to find solitude and contemplate the mysteries of the universe.
NobleI was exiled from polite society and ended up here. It's not what I'm used to.
OutlanderI grew up among the Reghed nomads or in the mountains with the goliaths.
SageI came to study the Everlasting Rime and Auril's magic. It's unprecedented.
SailorI sailed the Sea of Moving Ice and got stranded when my ship was destroyed by an iceberg.
SoldierI was stationed in Icewind Dale as part of a garrison and never left.
UrchinI was born and raised in Ten-Towns. I've never known anything but winter.

Goliath Player Characters

Goliaths from the Spine of the World are a common sight in Icewind Dale. They come from one of two rival settlements described in Chapter 2: Skytower Shelter or Wyrmdoom Crag. A goliath from one settlement is familiar with its inhabitants and their longstanding feud with the rival settlement.

Goliaths speak both Common and Giant. The @UUID[Compendium.rotf.rotf-actors.Actor.GoliathWarrior001]{Goliath Warrior} and @UUID[Compendium.rotf.rotf-actors.Actor.GoliathWerebear01]{Goliath Werebear} stat blocks are available in the module's actor compendium.

Character Secrets (Appendix B)

Appendix B contains secrets to hand to players at the start of the adventure. Each secret provides a special trait, ability, or piece of information. A character can have only one secret.

All 17 secret card images are in the module asset library and can be shown to players as handouts.

SecretMechanical Benefit
Alagondar ScionDescended from the last lord of Neverwinter. Social benefits in certain cities.
DoppelgangerYou are secretly a doppelganger who has forgotten their true nature.
Drizzt FanObsessed with Drizzt Do'Urden. Special interactions with drow and surface elves.
Elusive ParamourSomeone very dangerous is looking for you.
Escaped PrisonerYou escaped from Revel's End. Guards there will recognize you.
Littlest YetiRaised by yetis. Speak Yeti; advantage on Charisma checks to influence yetis.
Midwinter ChildBorn on Midwinter. Resistance to cold damage.
Old FlameA lover in Ten-Towns. They are friendly and helpful toward you.
Orc StoneMagic stone (uncommon, attunement). Summons an orc war chief spirit; usable 3 times before turning to dust.
Owlbear WhispererOwlbears are predisposed to like you. DC 10 Charisma (Animal Handling) to shift attitude.
Pirate CannibalSurvived a shipwreck by eating crewmates. The Dark Duchess and its treasure are still out there.
Reghed HeirOffspring of @UUID[Compendium.rotf.rotf-actors.Actor.BjornhildSolvig1]{Queen Bjornhild Solvigsdottir} of the Tiger Tribe. Prerequisite: human, half-elf, or half-orc.
ReincarnationDied and brought back by a druid's reincarnate spell. Retain memories of previous life in Icewind Dale.
Ring HunterSeeking a knucklehead trout that swallowed your father's signet ring. Must retrieve to preserve your inheritance.
Runaway AuthorWrote a scandalous exposé. Powerful enemies forced you into hiding in Icewind Dale.
Slaad HostA red slaad implanted an egg in you. Two months until it gestates and kills you.
SpyYou are a spy for an outside organization operating in Icewind Dale.

Handout images: modules/rotf/assets/images/handout-character-secrets-p1.webp and modules/rotf/assets/images/handout-character-secrets-p2.webp
